meta.attribution: Product data attributed to Product Hunt.
meta.commercialUsage: Product Hunt API must not be used for commercial purposes without Product Hunt approval.

issues.title: 产品灵感日报 · 20 个新品

products.name: Badge
products.tagline: AI agents collect peer reviews to generate proof of work
products.summaryZh: AI代理收集同行评审以生成工作量证明。
products.descriptionZh: Badge提供AI代理，收集同行评价以构建工作证明。对求职者而言——该代理连接你的联系人，向过往同事请求匿名评价，并生成可验证、可迁移的信任评分。对招聘经理而言——Badge让你能在30秒内完成候选人背景核查，从他们真实的同事处收集可靠反馈，取代不可靠的AI生成简历和领英推荐信。
products.description: Badge gives an AI agent that collects peer reviews to build proof of work. For job seekers - The agent connects to your contacts, requests anonymous reviews from your past colleagues, and builds a verified, portable trust score. score. For hiring managers - Badge gives you a 30 second reference checks on candidates, collecting authentic feedback from their actual coworkers to replace unreliable, AI-generated resumes and LinkedIn Recommendations.

products.name: Katalyst
products.tagline: The AI agent that works your Salesforce Pipeline
products.summaryZh: 在Salesforce管道中工作的AI代理
products.descriptionZh: Katalyst 是 Salesforce 平台上面向团队的 AI 销售助手。挂断电话后，一切已完成：通话摘要、记录创建、字段更新、跟进草稿、下一步安排。它全天候运行，读取每一通电话、邮件和日历，提取关键信号，为每次会议做好准备，并提示您采取行动：此处需跟进，此客户正在流失。新增功能：每个账户的 AI 解决方案、会议记录器、健康评分、交易模式。专为企业销售团队打造。
products.description: Katalyst is the AI sales agent for teams on Salesforce. Hang up a call and it's already done: notes summarized, records created, fields updated, follow-up drafted, next step set. It runs 24/7, reading every call, email, and calendar, surfacing the right signals, prepping you for each meeting, and prompting you to act: follow up here, this one’s slipping. What's new: AI Resolution on every account, meeting recorder, hygiene scores, deal patterns. Built for enterprise sales teams.

products.name: Scribble Network
products.tagline: The product that makes AI recommend your brand
products.summaryZh: 让AI推荐你品牌的产品
products.descriptionZh: 客户在问谷歌之前先问AI，而大多数品牌根本不知道自己是出现在搜索结果中，还是输给了竞争对手。其他工具只会给你一个可见度评分，然后就到此为止。Scribble则完成整个闭环：审计你在所有AI引擎中不可见的地方，创作填补差距的内容，并通过5万名创作者放大这些内容——这些创作者只有在AI引用他们时才能获得报酬。一份差距报告赢不了客户。成为被引用的答案才能赢。
products.description: Your customers ask AI before they ask Google, and most brands have no idea whether they show up or lose to a competitor. Every other tool hands you a visibility score and stops there. Scribble does the whole loop: audit where you're invisible across every AI engine, create content that closes the gap, and amplify it through 50,000 creators who only get paid when AI cites them. A gap report won't win customers. Being the cited answer will.

products.name: Mira
products.tagline: AI moderated interviews that read how people feel
products.summaryZh: AI 辅助的面试，能够感知受访者的情绪状态。
products.descriptionZh: 与仅止于访谈+转录的AI工具不同，Mira是完整的AI研究员——规划研究、全球招募（1亿+样本库，覆盖120个国家）、执行带有智能追问的动态访谈，并通过实时面部编码、语音情感AI和网络摄像头眼动追踪，独特地捕捉参与者的言语与情感。自动提取主题、生成洞察并产出研究报告。拥有17项专利，支持70多种语言。获联合利华、雀巢及150多个全球品牌信赖。完成2500万美元B轮融资。
products.description: Unlike AI tools that stop at interview + transcript, Mira is a full AI researcher — plans studies, recruits globally (100M+ panel, 120 countries), runs dynamic interviews with intelligent probing, and uniquely captures what participants say AND feel via real-time facial coding, voice emotion AI, and webcam eye tracking. Extracts themes, generates insights, and produces research reports automatically. 17 patents. 70+ languages. Trusted by Unilever, Nestlé and 150+ global brands. $25M Series B.

products.name: AI Emaily
products.tagline: Your AI inbox that writes like you + replies on autopilot
products.summaryZh: 你的AI收件箱，模仿你的风格写作，并自动回复。
products.descriptionZh: AI Emaily 是原生AI收件箱，像你的首席参谋一样运作。它读取每一条消息，筛选出真正需要你处理的内容，并屏蔽干扰。它能以你的语气——而非通用AI文本——起草回复，然后在一个收件箱内跨Gmail、Outlook及任意邮件服务商完成排期和发送。三种模式：手动、副驾驶、自动驾驶。你批准，它执行，所有操作均可撤销并保留完整审计记录。你的邮件绝不会用于训练模型。免费开始使用。
products.description: AI Emaily is the AI-native inbox that runs like your chief of staff. It reads every message, triages what actually needs you, and quiets the noise. It drafts replies in your own voice — not generic AI text — then schedules and sends across Gmail, Outlook, and any provider from one inbox. Three modes: Manual, Copilot, Autopilot. You approve, it acts, with undo and a full audit trail on everything. Your mail is never used to train models. Start free.

products.name: Ellis
products.tagline: AI notes for in-person meetings
products.summaryZh: AI笔记，适用于面对面会议
products.descriptionZh: Ellis 是一款适用于线下会议的AI笔记工具。录制会议后，即可获得清晰标注每位发言人的文字记录，并可随时提问——会议决定了什么、你错过了哪些内容、会议进展如何。无需笔记本电脑，无需额外硬件，只需你的iPhone（或Apple Watch）。
products.description: Ellis is an AI notetaker for in-person meetings. Record your meeting, get a clean transcript with each speaker identified, then ask anything — what was decided, what you missed, how it went. No laptop. No extra hardware. Just your iPhone (or Apple Watch).

products.name: Social Fetch
products.tagline: Social media scraper API for every major platform
products.summaryZh: 适用于所有主流平台的社交媒体数据抓取API
products.descriptionZh: 社交媒体数据抓取API，支持从TikTok、Instagram、YouTube、X、LinkedIn等平台获取公开资料、帖子、评论、视频、转录文本及数据指标。按量付费积分制，初始赠送100积分。
products.description: Social media scraping API for public profiles, posts, comments, videos, transcripts, and metrics from TikTok, Instagram, YouTube, X, LinkedIn, and more. Pay-as-you-go credits, 100 free to start.

products.name: Ogment AI
products.tagline: Your AI coworker, in Slack. Just tag @O.
products.summaryZh: 你在 Slack 里的 AI 同事。只需 @O 即可。
products.descriptionZh: @O 是原生集成于 Slack 的终极 AI 同事。像对待同事一样 @O，用日常英语提问或委派日常任务。它可连接企业使用的 1000 多种工具，在您休息时完成工作，并在 Slack 中跨整个团队共享记忆与技能——支持您选择的任意模型，包括自有模型。一键安装，5 分钟内即可让全员（而非仅高级用户）获得 AI 能力。零摩擦，最大化采用率。
products.description: @O is the ultimate AI coworker that lives natively in Slack. Tag @O like a colleague, to ask anything or delegate daily tasks in plain English. It connects to 1,000+ tools your business runs on, does work while you sleep, and shares memory and skills across your whole team right in Slack, on any model you choose, including your own. One-click install, and everyone is AI-enabled in under 5min, not just your power users. Zero friction, maximum adoption.

products.name: LongCat-2.0
products.tagline: 1.6T MoE trained entirely on AI ASICs
products.summaryZh: 1.6T MoE 完全基于 AI ASIC 训练
products.descriptionZh: LongCat-2.0 是一个采用 MIT 许可的 1.6T 参数 MoE 模型，拥有约 48B 活跃参数、1M 上下文窗口、LongCat 稀疏注意力机制，并针对编码和智能体工作流进行了后训练。该模型在 AI ASIC 超级计算集群上训练，并与 Claude Code、OpenClaw 和 Hermes 集成。
products.description: LongCat-2.0 is an MIT-licensed 1.6T-parameter MoE model with ~48B active parameters, 1M context, LongCat Sparse Attention, and post-training for coding and agentic workflows. It was trained on AI ASIC superpods and integrates with Claude Code, OpenClaw, and Hermes.

products.name: Glideo
products.tagline: Screen recordings that edit themselves
products.summaryZh: 自动剪辑的屏幕录制
products.descriptionZh: Glideo 是一款专为产品演示和开发工具设计的免费 macOS 屏幕录制工具。它能将原始屏幕录制转化为精良的演示视频：摄像头会自动跟随你的点击进行缩放，无需关键帧操作。同样的自动缩放功能会追踪你的点击和光标。同样精良的输出效果。同样带来“这看起来比原始屏幕录制好得多”的结果，且无需付费。无试用期。无水印。无隐藏条件。
products.description: Glideo is a free macOS screen recorder built for product demos and dev tools. It turns raw screen recordings into polished demo videos: the camera zooms toward your clicks automatically, with no keyframing. Same automatic zoom that follows your clicks and cursor. Same polished output. Same "this looks way better than a raw screen recording" result, without a price tag. No trial. No watermark. No catch.

products.name: Zoho Tables
products.tagline: Smarter way to manage work and data.
products.summaryZh: 更智能的工作与数据管理方式。
products.descriptionZh: Zoho Tables 是一款无代码的电子表格与数据库混合工具，具备AI能力，可组织工作、自动化流程并实现实时协作。
products.description: Zoho Tables is a no-code spreadsheet-database hybrid with AI brains to organise work, automate workflows, and collaborate in real time.

products.name: Onlook
products.tagline: Access your Ring cameras directly from your Mac’s menu bar.
products.summaryZh: 直接从Mac菜单栏访问你的Ring摄像头。
products.descriptionZh: 将您的Ring设备带到Mac菜单栏。实时画面、移动警报和即时回放，全部集成在一个应用中。
products.description: Bring your Ring devices to your Mac's menu bar. Live views, motion alerts, and instant replay all in one app.

products.name: Intervool
products.tagline: Turn customer interviews into roadmap decisions.
products.summaryZh: 将客户访谈转化为路线图决策。
products.descriptionZh: 你的客户洞察可能散落在 Zoom 录音、个人笔记和 Miro 白板中。Intervool 能存储这些对话，并让你对其进行结构化处理：提取痛点、需求、引述，以及你自定义的任何内容。我们将这些洞察聚类为主题，并按用户画像和细分群体进行拆解——这是其他工具做不到的。这些主题会转化为可排定优先级的功能，并围绕它们构建路线图，这一切都在 Intervool 内完成。我们跑通整个闭环。
products.description: Your customer insights are probably scattered across Zoom recordings, personal notes, and Miro boards. Intervool stores those conversations and lets you structure them: pull out pain points, requests, and quotes — plus anything you define. We cluster those insights into themes and break them down by persona and segment, something no other tool does. Those themes become features you can prioritize and build a roadmap around, all within Intervool. We run the full loop.

products.name: Insight Engine
products.tagline: AI that makes your posts smarter, not just louder
products.summaryZh: 让帖子更聪明，而非更喧嚣的AI
products.descriptionZh: 多数AI写作工具只会模仿你的语气，但Insight Engine还能让思考更锐利。给它一个粗略想法、链接或PDF，它会研究真实事实，草拟3个角度，并在通过前用29种反套路模式对每篇草稿评分。人性化模式能修正ChatGPT草稿而不丢失事实。灵感页面从HN、Product Hunt和arXiv抓取新鲜角度。无需排期，无需OAuth，只有更锐利的帖子，按积分定价，而非订阅。
products.description: Most AI writers just mimic your tone. Insight Engine also makes the thinking sharper. Give it a rough idea, a link, or a PDF and it researches real facts, drafts 3 angles, and scores every draft against 29 anti-slop patterns before it passes. Humanize mode fixes your ChatGPT drafts without losing the facts. Ideas page pulls fresh angles from HN, Product Hunt, and arXiv. No scheduling, no OAuth, just sharper posts, priced per credit, not subscription.

products.name: Kuberns
products.tagline: The AI agent that deploys and manages your cloud
products.summaryZh: 部署和管理你的云端的AI代理
products.descriptionZh: Kuberns 是一个智能 AI 平台，可在数分钟内部署你的项目，与仍需手动配置的 Vercel、Render 或 Heroku 不同。连接你的 GitHub 仓库，点击部署，AI 代理便会自动处理基础设施、部署和云运维。专为希望更快交付的开发者、初创公司和团队打造，无按用户计费模式。
products.description: Kuberns is an agentic AI platform that deploys your projects in minutes, unlike Vercel, Render, or Heroku, which still need manual setup. Connect your GitHub repo, click deploy, and an AI agent handles infrastructure, deployment, and cloud operations automatically. Built for developers, startups, and teams who want to ship faster, with no per-user pricing.

products.name: Proof of Usefulness
products.tagline: Validation System for Real World Usefulness
products.summaryZh: 现实世界实用性验证系统
products.descriptionZh: HackerNoon 根据实际的人类、技术和财务采用情况评估项目，以回答最重要的问题：它有用吗？有人用吗？个人开发者和初创企业均可参与，并可免费使用有助于构建和推广有意义项目的工具。任何技术都受欢迎，但使用赞助商技术的 AI 和 ML 项目将获得更高奖项。
products.description: HackerNoon evaluates projects based on actual human, technical, and financial adoption to answer the most important questions. Is it useful? Do people use it? Individual developers and budding startups are welcome to participate, with access to free tools that help you build and promote something meaningful. Any technology is welcome, but bigger prizes are reserved for AI and ML projects that use sponsor technologies.

products.name: VibeDrift
products.tagline: Stop your AI agent getting worse as your codebase grows
products.summaryZh: 防止AI代理随着代码库增长而性能下降
products.descriptionZh: AI代理会随着代码库增长而变差——重复的辅助函数、冲突的模式以及损坏的功能。这就是漂移。VibeDrift通过一次快速本地扫描即可检测到它，并为你的代理提供上下文以阻止其产生。免费使用，本地运行，零代码离开你的机器。
products.description: AI agents get worse as your codebase grows - duplicate helpers, clashing patterns, and broken features. That's drift. VibeDrift detects it in one quick local scan and feeds your agent the context to stop creating it. Free to use, runs locally, and zero code leaves your machine.

products.name: Dupely
products.tagline: The trust layer for online shopping
products.summaryZh: 在线购物的信任层
products.descriptionZh: 大多数购物工具追逐优惠券，Dupely则解决信任问题。网购充斥着操纵行为：虚假降价、伪造评论、付费网红推广，以及可疑的白标卖家加价转售同一产品。DupeScore能以更低价格找到相同商品；Trust This Price通过90天价格历史标记虚假优惠；卖家徽章则揭示真正可信的商家。现已登陆iOS、Android和Chrome。Dupely正是网购缺失的信任层。
products.description: Most shopping tools chase coupons. Dupely tackles trust. Online shopping is full of manipulation: artificial price drops, fake reviews, paid influencers, and sketchy white label sellers reselling the same product at a markup. DupeScore finds identical products for less. Trust This Price flags fake savings using 90 days of price history. Seller badges show you who's actually credible. Now on iOS, Android, and Chrome. Dupely is the trust layer online shopping has been missing.

products.name: Kadoink AI
products.tagline: Gather people instantly by AI txt, video, or ringing phones
products.summaryZh: 通过AI短信、视频或电话铃声即时召集人员
products.descriptionZh: 通过AI短信、视频或电话即时召集人员。告诉Kadoink你需要谁。AI将他们聚集。说明是谁。说明原因。Kadoink召集所有人。AI驱动的实时沟通聚会。Kadoink找到联系你人群的最佳方式。视频、语音、短信、推送——AI选择路径。别再追着人跑。让Kadoink AI来做。你的AI聚会引擎。AI知道该联系谁以及如何联系。告诉Kadoink任务。AI处理对外联络。
products.description: Gather people instantly by AI txt, video, or ringing phones Tell Kadoink Who You Need. AI Gets Them Together. Say Who. Say Why. Kadoink Gathers Everyone. AI-Powered Gathering for Real-Time Communication Kadoink Finds the Best Way to Reach Your People Video, Voice, Text, Push — AI Chooses the Path Stop Chasing People. Let Kadoink AI. Your AI Gathering Engine AI That Knows Who to Reach and How Tell Kadoink the Mission. AI Handles the Outreach.

products.name: Norte
products.tagline: Get back every benefit your cards already pay for.
products.summaryZh: 拿回你的卡已经支付的每一项权益。
products.descriptionZh: 你的高端卡早已在积分、返现和保障上为你创造价值，但这些权益你从未真正兑现。Norte 与你一同管理这些福利，让你付出的价值真正落地。无需登录银行，无需输入卡号。平均每个 Norte 钱包中，每年约有 2600 美元的权益未被领取。*
products.description: Your premium cards are already paying you back in credits, points, and protection you never collect. Norte runs those benefits with you, so the value you paid for actually lands. No bank login. No card numbers. The average Norte wallet has about $2,600 a year sitting uncaptured.*
